---
title: "Skills"
---

<script type="text/javascript">
 function showhide(id) {
    var e = document.getElementById(id);
    e.style.display = (e.style.display == 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
 }
</script>

<style>

</style>

## Computer Engineering

### Embedded Systems

* Programming
  + C/C++ 
  + Python
  + Assembly
  + Machine code
  + Register-level C 
  + Simulink
* Development Environments
  - Code Composer Studio
  - MATLAB
  - Energia
  - Arduino
* Embedded Operating Systems
  - ROS (Robot Operating System)
  - VxWorks
  - FreeRTOS 
  - Linux
    + Real-Time 
    + Embedded 
    + Raspberry OS (Raspian)
  - Windows IOT
* Microcontrollers
  - LattePanda 
  - ESP 8266 
  - MSP 432
  - Arduino
    + Uno
    + Nano
    + Mega
  - Raspberry Pi
    
### Digital Systems
  
* HDL 
  - Verilog
    + Behavioral
    + Dataflow
    + Structural
  - VHDL
* FPGA 
  - Artix 7
  - Kintex 7
  - PolarFire
* Simulation
  - Verilog Test Bench
  - Logisim
* Logic Integrated Circuits 
  + TTL (7400-Series)
  + CMOS
  
### Internet of Things

* Communications
* Information
* Fourier Series and Transform
* Filters
* Networking

### Circuit Analysis

* LTspice Software
* Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps
  - MOSFETS
  - BJT
* Basic Circuits
  - Inductors
  - Capacitors 
  - Resistors
* Methods and Techniques
  - Node
  - Mesh

## Data Science

### Tools

* R, Rmd and RStudio     
  Packages include:
  + tidyverse
    - ggplot 2 
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - readr
    - purr 
    - tibble
    - stringr
    - forcats
  + knitr
  + reticulate
  + lubridate
  + dygraphs
  + sf (simple features)
  + leaflet
  + devtools
  + downloader
  + pagedown
  + pacman
  + installer
  + blogdown
  + mosaic
  + car
* Python and Jupyter Notebook     
  Libraries include:
  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Plotly
  + Math
  + Tensor Flow
  + SciPy
* Tableau
* Databases
  + Spreadsheets
    - Excel 
    - Google Sheets
  + SQL
    - Oracle
    - MySQL

### Statistics

Tests include:

* Distributions
* Z Scores
* Confidence Interval
* t test
* Wilcox
* ANOVA
* Kruskal-Wallis
* Linear and Logistic Regression
* Chi-Squared 
  + Independence
  + Goodness of Fit
* Permutation and Randomization
    
### Data Management

* Intuition
* Insight 
* Wrangling 
* Visualization
* Exploration
* Consulting
* Mining
  
### Machine Learning

Algorithms include:

* Classifiers
* Clustering
* Decision Trees
* K-Nearest Neighbors
* Neural Networks

## Web Development

<ul>

  <li>HTML</li>
  <li>CSS</li>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('JS')"><li>JavaScript</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 21/25</span>
  </span></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('CS')"><li>C#</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 23/25</span>
  </span></div>
</ul>  


### R-based webpages

* Basic knitr    
  Basic building blocks:
  - knitr (R package)
  - _site.yml
  - index.Rmd
* Blogdown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - blogdown (R package)
  - config.toml
  - index.Rmd
<!-- * Bookdown     -->
<!--   Basic building blocks: -->
<!--   - bookdown (R package) -->
<!--   - config.toml -->
<!--   - index.Rmd   -->
* Pagedown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - pagedown (R package and templates)
  - knitr (R package)
  - Rmarkdown
  
## Mathematics

<ul>

  <li>Differential Calculus</li>
  <li>Linear Algebra</li>
  <li>Boolean Algebra</li>
  <li>College Algebra</li>
  <li>Trigonometry</li>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('math')"><li>Basic Math</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>
</ul>  

### Discrete Math

* Sets and Logic
* Functions and Relations
* Combinatorics and Probability
* Number Theory and Practice
* Trees and Graphs
* Languages and Grammars

### Functional Programming
    
* MATLAB
* Mathematica
* Elisp
* Erlang

## Information Technology

### Operating Systems

* Linux
  + Ubuntu
  + Fedora
  + Crouton
  + Debian
* Chrome OS
* Microsoft Windows
  + Office 365
  + Active Directory
* Virtual Machines
  + VirtualBox
  + VMware
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch
  <!-- + Powershell -->
  + Windows Task Scheduler

### Cloud Computing

* Git
  + Github
  + Bash
* Google Cloud
  + Drive
  + Colab
* Docker
* Kubernetes

### Security  

* Social Engineering
* Cryptography
* Data and Networks 
* Authentication, Access and Accounts
* Binary Analysis

## General Programming

### Languages

<ul>

  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('C++')"><li>C/C++</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Java')"><li>Java</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 22/25</span>
  </span></div>
  
  <div style="padding-left:1px;">
  <span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Python')"><li>Python</li></a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
  </span></div>
</ul>  

### Design Patterns

* Multithreading
* UML Diagrams
* Model–view–controller
* Test Driven Development
* Observer
* Factory
* Singleton
* Adapter
* Template
* Composite

## Industry Knowledge

### Interpersonal Skills

* Technical Communication
* Human Relations
* Problem Solving
* Teaching

### Research

* Scientific 
* Computational
* Security
* Market 
* Data

### Project Management

* Technical Teamwork
* Risk Management
* Methodologies
  + Agile
  + Scrum
  + Waterfall
* Kanban Board
  + Trello
  + Jira
